title: Transport Coherence Basin World — Runtime Configuration Schema
description: Placeholder schema. No runtime implementation exists yet.

step_length.description: Step length used in the coherence basin smoke run. Confirm before using as validation reference.

stride.description: Stride=4 was used in the coherence_basin_on_stride_4 cells in the DOE.

oracle.description: Transport oracle configuration for coherence basin probing.

epsilon.description: Convergence threshold. 0.05 was used in the promoted artifact. All 289 regions unsealed at this value.

precision_floor.description: Finest precision level the oracle will attempt. 0.003125 is the finest used in the promoted artifact.

expected_risk_regions.description: Reference value from the promoted artifact. Deviations trigger HUD warning.

expected_sealed_regions.description: Expected number of sealed convergent regions. 0 in the promoted artifact.

field_experiment.description: Planned parameterization experiment: vary the IOR gradient at the GRIN outer shell to test whether instability is parameterization-dependent or topological.

ior_gradient_mode.description: IOR gradient profile at the GRIN outer shell boundary. 'current' matches the promoted artifact.

show_instability_diff.description: When true, show a diff overlay between risk regions at current vs. modified parameterization.

audience.description: Intended audience. This world is rated 'researcher' — requires coherence basin methodology background.
